titleStmt.title: SII 34.227: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 227. Ambukōvil, Alangudi Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Bhaktalalitēśvara temple.

summary.p: Pāṇḍya, Śrīvallabha, 17+2nd year, Siṁha, sudi 12, Monday, Uttarāshāḍha = A.D. 1275, August 5, Monday (probably).
Incomplete. The nāṭṭār of Kuḷattūr-nāḍu in Poyyiṟ-kūṟṟam decided to give 30 kalam of paddy annually to the temple of Vīrarājēndra-chōḻēśvaram at Aḻimbil in Paṉṟiyūr-nāḍu a unit of Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tribhuvanaccakratti śrīvallabhadevakku 10 7 vatu Etir Iraṇṭāvatu
simha nāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu dvādaśiyum tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa
Uttirāṭattu nāḷ rācarāca vaḷanāṭṭup paṉṟiyūr nāṭṭu Aḻimpil nāyaṉār Uṭai
yār vīrarājēndrara cōḷīśvaramuṭaiya nāyanārkku poyyiṟ kūṟṟattuk ku
ḷattūr nāṭṭavarōm pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu Innāḷ mutal
Innāyaṉārkku Āṇṭoṉṟukku muppatiṉ kala nellu Aḷakkak kaṭavōmā
kavum Ippaṭi cammatittu pramāṇam paṇṇi kuṭuttōm vīrarājēndrara cōḷīśva
ramuṭaiya nāyaṉārkkuk kuḷattūr nāṭṭavarōm cantirātittavarai cellumpaṭi kallum
cempilum veṭṭikkuṭuttom Āṉai toṇṭamāṉārum mātēyar Allāḷa nāya
rum Uṭappaṉ kuḷattairāyarum
Digital edition of SII 34.227 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
